summary: QA phase complete. All 8 acceptance criteria verified. Backend (10/10), frontend unit (2/2), widget states (8/8 code-reviewed). Zero bugs. dart analyze and flutter test gates pass.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: Test catalog (qa.md), unit tests (get_generate_cover_use_case_test.dart), contract (qa.json) all present

qualityGates.name: tests_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.notes: Backend: 10/10 pass. Frontend unit: 2/2 pass. Flutter test: 7/7 pass. Widget ACs verified by code review (8/8).

qualityGates.name: acceptance_criteria_verified
qualityGates.notes: All 8 ACs from US-4-1 and US-4-2 verified: TC-4-8 through TC-4-15. Loading overlay, regenerate button, error handling, 16:9 aspect ratio, upload always available, form state independence all confirmed.
